overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at sunset, passing under a pedestrian overpass and looking up at towering corporate skyscrapers with neon billboards. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077 game engine, showing detailed urban architecture and moderate vehicle traffic along a multi-lane highway.

events.description: red sports car passes by on the right side of the highway
camera slightly shifts right while continuing forward along the median

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway median toward the pedestrian overpass, observing passing traffic and towering corporate buildings

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the highway

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying Trauma Team medical services with blue neon interface
tall skyscraper with red illuminated Arasaka signage at the top
elevated walkway crossing over the highway with digital signage underneath
concrete and metal barrier separating highway lanes with scattered trash and debris

segments.scene_description: Walking along a highway median toward a pedestrian overpass during golden hour, with the massive Arasaka corporate tower dominating the left skyline. A red sports car passes by on the right as the camera approaches the overpass structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area beneath highway overpass with concrete support pillars

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the pedestrian overpass, lighting becomes shadowed
passing behind large concrete support pillar, temporarily blocking view of the street

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure, navigating around the concrete support pillar on the left side

entered.detail: large digital billboard mounted on the overpass underside displaying a woman's face with purple hair
massive concrete support pillar with yellow painted base and weathered texture
tree with pink blossoms growing in planter near the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Moving into the shadowed space beneath the pedestrian overpass, passing the massive concrete support pillars. A digital screen on the overpass underside displays a woman's face, while a cherry blossom tree stands near the pillar. The Trauma Team billboard disappears from view as the camera passes under the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway past overpass with corporate plaza and advertising displays

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area back into open sky and direct sunlight
camera begins turning left to face the corporate buildings and away from the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the overpass then turning left to view the towering corporate architecture and glass facades

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the highway on the left side

entered.detail: digital advertising screen at ground level displaying a smiling face with the number 2
modern glass building with grid pattern windows reflecting the golden hour sunset

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into open sunlight, passing a ground-level advertising kiosk. The camera turns left to face the glass corporate facades while the overpass recedes into the background on the right. A silver sedan drives by on the left as the perspective shifts toward the towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate plaza looking up at skyscrapers and overpass underside

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the full height of the Arasaka tower and surrounding skyscrapers
panning across to view the overpass structure from below, showing its underside architecture

agents.ego_description: standing still or moving slowly while looking up at the towering architecture, overpass structure, and digital billboards from a low angle perspective

segments.scene_description: Looking up at the monumental scale of the Arasaka corporate tower and glass skyscrapers against the sunset sky. The camera pans to show the underside of the pedestrian overpass structure and the cherry blossom tree in the foreground, emphasizing the vertical cyberpunk architecture and layered urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sun-drenched highway median into the shadows of an urban overpass and finally upward toward a towering corporate skyline. It begins by walking toward a pedestrian bridge during the golden hour, with the massive Arasaka tower dominating the left skyline as a red sports car speeds past on the right. As the camera moves beneath the overpass, the light dims and the view shifts to concrete support pillars, a cherry blossom tree, and a digital screen displaying a woman's face. The scene then emerges back into open sunlight, passing a ground-level advertising kiosk before turning left to face the glass corporate facades as a silver sedan drives by. Finally, the camera tilts upward to capture the monumental scale of the skyscrapers against the sunset sky, panning back to frame the overpass and cherry blossom tree against the vertical cyberpunk architecture.
